seo.default_title: GRVT MES | Independent ISA-95 Level 3 Manufacturing Execution System
seo.default_description: GRVT is an open-source, ISA-95 compliant Level 3 MES built for SME electronics manufacturers. Perfect for SMT, PCB, and PCBA production control.
seo.home_title: Home | GRVT MES - The Independent Level 3 Layer
seo.home_description: Bridge the gap between your factory floor (L2) and ERP (L4) with GRVT's independent Level 3 MES. Lightweight, professional, and open-source.
seo.about_title: About Us | Designed by Manufacturing Experience
seo.about_description: Meet the Dannie team—factory owners and engineers who built GRVT to solve real-world PCB assembly and SMT production challenges.
seo.privacy_description: Learn how GRVT and the Dannie ecosystem manage your industrial data with professional standards and transparency.
seo.terms_title: Terms of Service | Industrial Usage Agreements
seo.terms_description: Read our terms for professional industrial use, including our production liability disclaimers and open-source license agreements.

hero.subtitle: GRVT is an independent, ISA-95 compliant Level 3 MES designed to bridge the gap between your factory floor (L2) and any ERP (L4). Lightweight, open-source, and built for SMT precision.

about.hero_subtitle: A team of factory owners, engineers, and production leads who spent a decade running high-mix SMT lines before writing a single line of code for GRVT.
about.what_we_do_desc_1: GRVT MES is supported by Dannie's global manufacturing network. While the software provides the L3 control layer, our e-commerce platform at dannie.cc provides the sourcing, DFM checking, and Gerber-to-PCBA ordering infrastructure.
about.what_we_do_desc_2: We don’t just sell software; we provide the blueprint for digital manufacturing. From prototype to mass production, we ensure your data flow is as seamless as your material flow.
about.goal_desc: To become the world's most reliable and transparent manufacturing partner for hardware companies — removing uncertainty from the supply chain, one build at a time.
about.vision_desc: A future where every hardware company — from a two-person startup to a global OEM — can build with Certainty.

quality.title: Quality Control
quality.desc: AOI, X-ray, ICT, and functional testing

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.desc: We believe every stakeholder deserves full visibility into what happens on our floor.

precision.title: Precision
precision.desc: We hold ourselves to zero-defect standards—not as a goal, but as a baseline expectation.

partnership.title: Partnership
partnership.desc: We treat our customers as co-builders. Your product roadmap is our roadmap.

globalness.title: Globalness
globalness.desc: Rooted in Europe, scaled globally. We bring the best of every region to every build.

about.team_desc: A cross-continental team of engineers, operators, and innovators — united by a single obsession: quality.

ceo.name: Dannie CEO
ceo.desc: Visionary leader driving Dannie's mission to bring transparency and precision to global electronics manufacturing.

ops.name: Operations Lead
ops.desc: Orchestrates our three-hub global manufacturing network, ensuring seamless production from prototype to mass delivery.

eng.name: Engineering Director
eng.desc: Leads our cross-functional engineering squads across Lithuania, Turkey, and China with a relentless focus on quality.

innovation.name: Innovation Lead
innovation.desc: Drives the digital transformation and technology partnerships that keep Dannie at the forefront of smart manufacturing.

about.cta_desc: Let's talk about your project. Our team is ready to take it from schematic to shipment.

solutions.title: Dedicated Level 3 Control
solutions.subtitle: Professional electronics manufacturing requires a distinct execution layer. GRVT bridges the 'Excel Gap' between machinery (L2) and office systems (L4), delivering rapid, modular solutions for your most critical SMT challenges.

mats.title: Material Intelligence
mats.desc: UID-based reels, MSL, and paste lifecycle tracking with label printing and smart storage integration.
mats.prob_desc: Phantom inventory and manual counts erode planning. We restore confidence with real-time stock updates.

safety.title: Process Safety & Interlocks
safety.desc: Feeder setup verification, splice capture, and process interlocks to stop errors at the tool.
safety.prob_desc: Manual data entry causes avoidable errors. We reduce mistakes at the source.

connectivity.title: Open Connectivity
connectivity.desc: IPC-CFX & Hermes-ready architecture to connect machines, counters, and analytics without costly drivers.
connectivity.prob_desc: Multiple spreadsheets and point tools create friction. We consolidate data and automate material flows.

trace.title: Trace & As-Built
trace.desc: As-built genealogy, digital work instructions, and audit-ready traceability for regulated sectors.
trace.prob_desc: Without traceability, recalls and audits are expensive. As-built genealogy puts you in control.

phases.title: Your Factory Keeps Running
phases.subtitle: Even When Office Systems Go Down
phases.big_idea_desc: If your ERP system goes offline (server crash, network outage, ransomware attack), your factory floor should keep producing for at least 24 hours. Here's how we make that happen:

c1.title: Keep Office and Factory Apart
c1.std: Office computers and factory machines should not live on the same network. We keep them safely separated.
c1.ben: If someone clicks a bad email, production keeps running. Machines stay safe.

c2.title: A Safe Middle Stop
c2.std: Information doesn’t go straight from the office to the factory. It passes through a safe checkpoint first.
c2.ben: Only clean, approved data reaches your machines. Bad stuff gets blocked.

c3.title: Vendor Access Only When Needed
c3.std: Vendors get temporary access, only during scheduled work. It turns off automatically.
c3.ben: No forgotten logins. No hidden back doors. Just controlled access.

c4.title: Daily System Checkups
c4.std: Every day we compare office numbers with factory results and save backups.
c4.ben: Problems show up early. Fix them before they become expensive.

cta_banner.title: Ready to Control Your Factory Floor?
cta_banner.subtitle: Launch GRVT MES Core in minutes.

footer.tagline: Lightweight manufacturing execution system built for SMEs.

why.title: Why MES Systems Get Messy
why.subtitle: If this sounds familiar, you are not alone.

card_1.title: Too Many Systems, Nothing Talks
card_1.desc: Every new tool creates more chaos. One change breaks three others.

card_2.title: Nobody Trusts the Numbers
card_2.desc: Every system shows different data. Meetings turn into arguments.

card_3.title: Your Factory Is One Click Away From Disaster
card_3.desc: Office IT and production machines share the same network.

card_4.title: Humans Typing Data Always Fails
card_4.desc: Manual input means errors, delays, and lost money.

seo.home_title: GRVT MES | Independent ISA-95 Level 3 Manufacturing Execution System
seo.home_description: GRVT is an open-source, ISA-95 compliant Level 3 MES built for SME electronics manufacturers. Scale your factory with pure L3 control.
seo.about_title: About Us | Dannie Global EMS & Manufacturing Expertise
seo.about_description: Learn about the team behind GRVT MES. Dannie is a global EMS partner providing PCB/PCBA manufacturing and full system integration across Europe and Asia.
seo.privacy_description: Read how we handle your professional manufacturing data and maintain Level 3 security standards.
seo.terms_title: Terms of Service | Production Liability & Licensing
seo.terms_description: Understand the Apache 2.0 licensing and the professional production liability terms for using the GRVT MES platform.

dannie_widget.subtitle: Our MES platform connects seamlessly with the Dannie e-commerce engine. Securely upload your designs for instant DFM analysis and competitive pricing.
dannie_widget.footer: No login required for Gerber view

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.s1_content: By accessing GRVT MES, you agree to these terms for professional industrial use. This platform is provided by Dannie as a free Level 3 MES tool to support the PCB/PCBA manufacturing community. Usage is 'as is' and subject to professional oversight.
terms.s2_content: CRITICAL: GRVT MES is a free tool. In no event shall Dannie or the developers be liable for any production errors, manufacturing scrap, financial losses, or physical damages resulting from the use of this software. You are solely responsible for final quality control (QC) and production outcomes.
terms.s3_content: GRVT MES is licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0. You are free to use, modify, and distribute the code, provided you adhere to the license terms. The software is provided WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND.
terms.s4_content: This service may integrate with other Dannie platforms (e.g., dannie.cc). While we strive for seamless connectivity between MES and E-commerce ordering, each service operates under its own specific functional and legal agreements.
terms.s5_content: You are responsible for the data integrity of your organization, facility layouts, and work orders. We provide the infrastructure; you provide the professional manufacturing logic.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1_content: We collect professional information (name, work email, company name) and manufacturing metadata (facility nodes, BOM structures) required to operate your Level 3 MES. We do not currently store highly sensitive personal financial data on this platform.
privacy.s2_content: Dannie is a global entity. Your data may be processed in the EU (Lithuania) or other regional hubs. We adhere to high standards of data protection (GDPR-aligned) regardless of where the processing occurs.
privacy.s3_content: The primary purpose of this tool is to provide free production value and act as a gateway to the broader Dannie ecosystem, including our e-commerce and assembly services at dannie.cc.
privacy.s4_content: We implement industry-standard technical and organizational measures. However, as an open-access free tool, you acknowledge that no cloud system is 100% impenetrable and you use the service at your own risk.
privacy.s5_content: We retain your manufacturing configurations as long as your account is active. You may request data deletion or account closure at any time through our support channels.
